name: What evidence do I need for work accident claim?

mainEntity.name: What evidence do I need for work accident claim?

acceptedAnswer.description: Medical records, witness statements, incident reports, photos.[2] Context: Proves arising out of employment and causation.[4] Key factors: Timely employer notice; doctor links injury to work.[3] Practical guidance: Collect immediately; video unsafe conditions. Strengthen idiopathic claims with floor risk proof. Lawyer organizes submission.
